name: bg-progress-dark
prompt: a soft warm app background illustration, flat vector, gentle and non-distracting, low-contrast, soft gradients and faint paper texture, NO text, NO words, NO guitar fretboard lines. Keep the CENTER calm and mostly empty for app content. Wide landscape composition. Design language: large soft rounded translucent organic blobs forming gentle soft bands along the top edge and the bottom edge, with a calm center band between them. Cozy dark palette: dark #221A14 center, blobs in muted teal, warm amber glow and soft coral over the dark base. Plus a soft simple progress signifier placed clearly in the VERY TOP-RIGHT corner, high up near the upper-right edge (NOT low, NOT in the middle, NOT at the bottom): a few small ascending rounded bars like a mini bar chart with a gentle upward trend and a small star at the top, suggesting stats and progress; a couple of soft sparkles near the other edges. Absolutely NO martial-arts belt and NO ribbon.
